name: 1 MG Pomalidomide Capsules
about: 1 MG Pomalidomide Capsules are a type of general medicine that is used to treat certain types of cancer, such as multiple myeloma. These capsules come in a physical form of easy-to-swallow capsules with a dosage of 1mg. The medicine is manufactured in India and should be stored in a dry and cool place to maintain its effectiveness. The dosage guidelines for this medicine should be followed as per the doctors suggestion, and it should not be taken without consulting a physician.

faq.q: What is the dose of 1 MG Pomalidomide Capsules?
faq.a: The dose of 1 MG Pomalidomide Capsules is 1mg.

faq.q: What is the physical form of 1 MG Pomalidomide Capsules?
faq.a: 1 MG Pomalidomide Capsules come in the form of capsules that are easy to swallow.
This medicine is manufactured in India.

faq.q: How should 1 MG Pomalidomide Capsules be stored?
faq.a: This medicine should be stored in a dry and cool place to maintain its effectiveness.

faq.q: Can 1 MG Pomalidomide Capsules be taken without consulting a physician?
faq.a: No, this medicine should not be taken without consulting a physician. The dosage guidelines for this medicine should be followed as per the doctors suggestion.
